genres.title: Change Genres
genres.description: Select genres. The more precisely you narrow down, the better AI can utilize the information. You can select all or none.

settings.title: Settings
settings.models_description: Select 1-5 models to show in the menu. Models require API keys (.env).
settings.bridge_dir_hint: Directory where MCP and Lua-bridge communicate via JSON files.
settings.profile_dsl: DSL Production - recommended for most AIs
settings.profile_groq: Groq Essential - lightweight, Groq models limit 128 tools
settings.profile_hint: Automatic selects the profile based on active AI. DSL Production works for most.
settings.api_keys_hint: API keys are stored in the .env file. Changes require a server restart.
settings.api_keys_saved: API keys saved! Restart Hipare for changes to take effect.
settings.setup_step_1: 1. Register on the service page of your choice
settings.setup_step_2: 2. Create an API key from the service settings
settings.setup_step_3: 3. Copy the key here and save
settings.setup_step_5: 5. New models will appear in the AI Models tab
settings.select_model_error: Select at least one model or enter an API key.
settings.enter_api_key_error: Enter at least one API key.
settings.models_load_failed: Model loading failed. Check API keys.
settings.no_models_available: No models available. Check API keys in the .env file.

studio.title: Studio Setup
studio.description: Describe your equipment - mics, instruments, audio interface, etc.

onboarding.step1_description: Hipare needs at least one API key to work. You can add more later from settings.
onboarding.step2_description: AI will consider your equipment and instruments in the conversation. You can update details later from settings.
onboarding.step2_placeholder: E.g.: Focusrite Scarlett 2i2, Shure SM7B, Audio-Technica ATH-M50x, Yamaha HS8, Arturia MiniLab...
onboarding.step3_has_keys: Select the AI models you want to use. You can change this later in settings.
onboarding.step3_no_keys: No API keys entered — you can add them later from settings.
onboarding.step4_text_1: Hipare was born from a passion for music and a desire to make production easier for everyone.
onboarding.step4_text_2: The name comes from the nickname of our beloved dog. The heart shape in the icon is the shape of the heart marking on our Hippu's nose. 🐕
onboarding.step4_text_3: Hipare's purpose is not to create finished art or replace artists or studio professionals. Its purpose is to help create what would otherwise remain uncreated — and to help people focus on their passion.
onboarding.coffee_text: ☕ Donations enable further development of Hipare
